nasb.text: then hear from heaven Your dwelling place, and forgive, and render to each according to all his ways, whose heart You know for You alone know the hearts of the sons of men,

esv.text: then hear from heaven your dwelling place and forgive and render to each whose heart you know, according to all his ways, for you, you only, know the hearts of the children of mankind,

cnv.text: 求你從天上你的居所垂聽和赦免他們，你是知道人心的，你必照著各人所行的報應各人；因為只有你知道世人的心。

ccb.text: 求你从天上的居所垂听，赦免他们。唯独你能洞察人心，你必按各人的行为施行赏罚，
